mapper.select: SELECT count(agent_num) cnt FROM agent WHERE ${findtype} LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findkey}, '%')

SELECT agent_num, agent_name, agent_phone, agent_photo, office_name, office_address, agent_local, agent_salecount FROM agent WHERE ${findtype} LIKE CONCAT('%', #{findkey}, '%') ORDER BY agent_num DESC LIMIT #{strnum}, #{pageSize}
